history.title: Opium Made Easy
history.description: Opium Made Easy By Michael Pollan Harper's Magazine, April 1, 1997Last season was a strange one in my garden, notable not only for the unseasonably cool and wet weather—the talk of gardeners all over New England—but also for its climate of paranoia. One flower was the cause: a tall, breathtaking pop
